idea-plugin.name: Zinki for Claude AI
idea-plugin.description:
Zinki for Claude AI — AI Code Skills for Go Developers

Beta release. Run Claude Code AI skills on selected Go code directly from GoLand's built-in terminal. Zero context switching.

🚀 Getting Started

  1. Install Claude Code CLI
    Open a terminal and run:
    npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
  2. Authenticate
    Run claude in a terminal and follow the login prompt (one-time setup).
  3. Make sure Go is on your PATH
    Run go version to confirm.
  4. Select code in the editor
    Highlight any Go code snippet.
  5. Right-click → Zinki for Claude AI
    Choose a skill, set options in the dialog, and Claude streams output directly in the built-in terminal.
  6. Save results (optional)
    At the end of each skill, Claude will ask if you want to save the output as a Markdown file.

✨ Skills (Beta)

  • Explain Code Ctrl+Alt+E — Step-by-step explanation with ASCII diagrams, analogies, gotchas, and debugging tips
  • Review Code Ctrl+Alt+R — Deep review covering security, performance, concurrency, and readability
  • Simplify Code Ctrl+Alt+S — Rewrite to idiomatic Go; runs unit tests to verify behavior

⚙️ Prerequisites

  • Claude Code CLI: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
  • Authenticated Claude session (run claude once to log in)
  • Go installed and on PATH
  • PowerShell (Windows) or bash (macOS/Linux)

💡 Tips

  • The first run opens a dedicated Zinki for Claude AI terminal tab — subsequent runs reuse it
  • Each skill adapts to your options — try different depth/focus combinations
  • Type 1 when Claude asks to save output as a Markdown file next to your source file

More skills (Write Docs, Generate Tests, Fix Bug, Refactor) coming in v1.0.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0-beta
  • Beta release: Explain Code, Review Code, Simplify Code
  • Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Alt+E / Ctrl+Alt+R / Ctrl+Alt+S
  • Terminal reuse — single "Zinki for Claude AI" tab across all invocations
  • File and package context auto-included in every prompt
  • Save output as Markdown via in-terminal prompt

action.description: Explain selected Go code using Claude AI
Review selected Go code using Claude AI
Simplify selected Go code using Claude AI
